title: Forever World Visual Tweaks
description: My personal tweaks to the looks of shaders and the visuals of the game. Contains a list of Vanilla Tweaks Resource and Data Packs as well as the config for my settings for the BSL shader.
body:
## Visual Fidelity
Enhance your Minecraft experience with my personal visual tweaks! This project customizes the appearance of the shaders and overall game visuals to create a more immersive and visually appealing world. It includes my curated configuration for the BSL Shader, fine-tuned to achieve the look I prefer that doesnt clash with the vanilla feel or the Particular & Wakes mod, along with a list of Vanilla Tweaks Resource & Data Packs to complement the enhancements.

Whether you’re looking for subtle lighting adjustments, refined colors, or overall aesthetic improvements, this pack brings together my personal settings in one convenient package, making it easy to replicate my visual setup in your own game. Perfect for players who want to enjoy Minecraft with enhanced visuals without spending hours tweaking individual settings.

**Features**
- Custom BSL Shader configuration optimized for balanced visuals
- Collection of Vanilla Tweaks Resource & Data Packs
- Improved lighting, colors, and in-game effects
- Easy-to-install setup for replicating my personal visual style

Bring your Minecraft world to life with these enhancements and enjoy a unique, visually polished experience!

## BSL Shader Customization
Create a txt file and paste the following contents into it. Import it into your BSL Shader settings and enjoy the customized experience. 

```
#Fri Mar 20 18:53:01 CET 2026
CLOUDS=3
REFLECTION=1
WATER_ALPHA_MODE=1
WATER_BUMP=0.12
WATER_CAUSTICS_STRENGTH=0.25
WATER_DETAIL=0.05
WATER_MODE=3
WATER_NORMALS=0
WATER_PARALLAX=false
WATER_SHARPNESS=0.8
WATER_SPEED=0.25
WAVING_WATER=false
```

## Vanilla Tweaks

### Visuals (Resource Packs)
- *GUI*
  - Clearer Wither Hearts
  - Colored Ping Indicator
- *3D*
  - 3D Bookshelves, 3D Chiseled Bookshelves
  - 3D Pointed Dripstone
  - 3D Chains, 3D Iron & Copper Bars
  - 3D Rails, 3D Ladders
  - 3D Sugar Cane, 3D Bushes, 3D Lily Pads, 3D Fungi, 3D Vines, 3D Glow Lichen
  - 3D Stonecutters
  - 3D Sun & Moon
  - 3D Sculk Vains
  - 3D Redstone Wire
  - 3D Items
  - 3D Doors & Trapdoors
  - 3D Amethyst Crystals
- *Aesthetic*
  - Flint Tipped Arrows
  - Colorful Enchanting Table Particles
  - Splash Bottle o' Enchanting
- *Unobstrusive*
  - Lower Fire
  - Lower Shield
- *Utility*
  - Visual Cauldron, Composter, Honey Stages
  - Visual NoteBlock Pitch
  - Brewing Guide
  - Directional Hoppers, Dispensers, Droppers, Observers
  - Groovy Levers
  - Redstone Power Levels
  - Fully Aged Crop & Amethyst Cluster Marker
  
### Convenience (Data Packs)
- Cauldron Concrete & Mud
